carousel_plan.headline: A risk-off Monday
carousel_plan.subtitle: Renewed US-Iran tension lifted oil and the dollar, and Indian indices snapped a two-day rising streak.
carousel_plan.takeaway: An external shock, not a domestic one. Domestic funds net bought about Rs 5,748 cr, cushioning the fall.
carousel_plan.visual_direction: Dark cover slide: near-black navy background, oversized headline, a single faint downward trend line, three index delta chips. Lots of negative space.

carousel_plan.headline: Kotak Mahindra Bank in focus
carousel_plan.subtitle: CEO Ashok Vaswani will not seek another term when it ends on 31 Dec 2026; the board has begun a succession search.
bullets: Stock fell about 3% to around Rs 397
Among the day's heaviest Nifty drags
Disclosed to exchanges on Sat, 27 Jun
carousel_plan.takeaway: A governance event at one index heavyweight can ripple into the whole banking index.
carousel_plan.visual_direction: Light data-card slide: white/very-light-grey background, one company stat block, a small neutral bar for the day's move, teal accent rule.

carousel_plan.headline: Autos led the fall
carousel_plan.subtitle: Nifty Auto was the worst major sector as costlier crude and a stronger dollar weighed on cyclicals.
carousel_plan.takeaway: A classic oil-and-dollar rotation: cyclicals lag while defensives like pharma and metals hold up.
carousel_plan.visual_direction: Light sector-panel slide: minimal horizontal sector-performance bars with exactly one highlighted (worst) bar in orange; structured and clean.

_note: Display copy refined by the creative-director step from the deterministic baseline (step2_content_plan) for premium, complete, ellipsis-free slide text.
